scriptLines: Cleanusers, CleanCards join(Cleanusers@id == client_id, joinType:'left') ~> usercardsjoin
usercardsjoin, CleanTranscation join(CleanCards@id == card_id, joinType:'left') ~> alljoin

alljoin select(mapColumn(id = Cleanusers@id, current_age, gender, yearly_income, card_brand, card_type, amount, merchant_state, errors), skipDuplicateMapInputs: true, skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select
select sink(allowSchemaDrift: true, format: 'table', insertable:true, errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError') ~> sink1
